name: # Johnny 5 master parameter sheet. Single source of truth for all build scripts.
# locked=1 values come from the approved BOM / Phase 00 handoff and must not change without a phase decision.
# locked=0 values are design choices made during Task 7 and may be tuned.
track_thickness
note: TPU track band thickness (raises axle line above pitch circle)

name: idler_dia
note: Front idler outer dia (matches sprocket for level top run)

name: roadwheel_dia
note: Road-wheel outer dia (supports TPU track between sprocket and idler)

name: tub_wall
note: Tub wall (6 perimeters @0.4); load zones thicker via bosses

name: tub_width
note: Tub outer width (sits 2mm inside inner track faces)

name: pi_shelf_z
note: Pi shelf height above tub floor (above battery)

name: torso_iface_dy
note: Torso bolt rectangle Y (M3 heat-set; inboard of 90 mm torso depth)

name: # --- Keyed split joint (used higher in the stack) ---
scs_body_h
note: SCS0009 body height incl output boss

name: torso_h
note: Torso height (deck top to torso top)

name: torso_lean
note: Front face forward lean over full height

name: shoulder_z_off
note: Shoulder pitch axis above deck top

name: # --- Head (envelope for stack/preview; detailed in head step) ---
# --- Arms (single-DOF shoulder pitch; grip-ready for V2 tendon claw) ---
arm_lever_max
note: Per-arm effective lever ceiling (shoulder torque limit)

name: nod_axis_z
note: Nod pivot height above head base

name: brow_blade_len
note: Blade length (outboard pivot to inner tip; clears centre)

name: brow_pivot_offset
note: Pivot X-offset from head centre (over outer eye)

name: caster_trail
note: Trail behind the rear track edge

name: caster_pivot_z
note: Arm pivot height on chassis rear

name: # --- Waist interface reserve (lean-ready for V2 powered waist) ---
